title: Law Refuses to Surrender
description: Pages 16–17 focus on law refuses to surrender, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as law's exchange with Doflamingo collapses as Fujitora and the Marines tighten the trap, while the Sunny team faces danger at sea.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So what exactly was the point...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: of helping half of the Strawhat crew escape....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: When the other half is in dress- Rosa...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'll just take them hostage and force the others to return Caesar to me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If you try that... well, there are far too many...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who undergo-Timated this crew and were burned for it. Isn't that right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's unfortunate, but my pirate alliance with the Strawhat crew ends here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Using them to stop the pro- auction of "Smile"s...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So even if I fail to have my reven- GE against you in this battle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: And you'll be elimi- nated by Kaidou!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I see how it is... so you are prepared to die along with me....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Although I'd love to see the ensuing chaos that your death brings to the world...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: It's far more important to set matters right in regards to 13 years ago!!! Joker!!!

summary: Law Refuses to Surrender focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as law's exchange with Doflamingo collapses as Fujitora and the Marines tighten the trap, while the Sunny team faces danger at sea.
